description: Manually cleaned transparent version of the AI badge emblem used as a real-image regression fixture.
notes: Use this version when evaluating lattice inference and thin-feature preservation without the baked checkerboard background contaminating results.
Primary failure region is the sword tip and nearby outline taper, plus other sharp single-pixel and near-single-pixel features at mixed orientations.
Keep the raw checkerboard-background version around separately when testing the automatic background stripper.
Revision 2 reapplies transparency as a raster mask and thresholds that mask to suppress subtle dark-background glow left by the earlier cleanup.
Revision 3 binarizes the repo fixture copy to strict 0/255 alpha so the regression asset stays unambiguous.
